faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: You can reset your password by clicking the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page and following the email instructions.

faqs.question: How can I update my billing address?
faqs.answer: Open your account settings, select Billing, and update your address in the profile section.

faqs.question: What is your refund policy?
faqs.answer: Refunds are available within 30 days of purchase for unused products, subject to our refund policy terms.

faqs.question: How do I contact support?
faqs.answer: You can contact support by emailing support@example.com or using the live chat option on our website.
